title: The ARG Container
description: A Minecraft mod that adds content from various Minecraft ARGs and webseries
body:
![Mod logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/01dfc05c7373dcfc265773e7f26ac883e3160d52.png)

The ARG Container mod brings your favorite Minecraft ARGs and web series right into your game.

This mod adds new:
- Blocks, 
- Items, 
- Ores, 
- Tools, 
- Armor sets, 
- Entities, 
- and so much more.
 
This mod wouldn’t be possible without the help of the ARG creators who contributed the textures.

**KEEP IN MIND THAT THIS MOD IS NOT FINISHED AND IT'S NOT READY FOR SURVIVAL.** 

**ALSO, THERE IS A LOT OF UNIMPLEMENTED STUFF AND FEATURES.**

**Again all the textures featured in this mod were provided by the creators of the ARGs**

ARGs that are included in this mod:
- Alphaver
- TBOTV (ACT 1 & 2)
- Classic Minecraft
- John ;)
- TheNick56
- MineWatch
- Lavacrusader
- RubyAlphaVoidDung
- Am I Alone?
- Dylan Does Minecraft (Player541)
- AndrewGaming67
- Snapshot Null
- Minecraft Alpha 1.1.2.07 Archive
- John202
- m00nlander
- Beta-IMPROVE
- Andrewgames722
- where_is_the_sky?
- full list can be found [here.](https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/14N3YfKYy4g9JPZDgaF5ZMcvZQR2o2Uj5-EldQO9R67w/edit?usp=sharing)
